2026-04-18T00:29:51.9566955Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9567518Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9568143Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9568520Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9568835Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9569467Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9569642Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9569835Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9570012Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9570259Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9570467Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9570764Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-18T00:29:51.9571042Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
